mapper.select: SELECT #{taskId} AS "taskId", max(assignee_id) FILTER (WHERE responsibility_level = 'NETWORK') AS "networkId", max(assignee_id) FILTER (WHERE responsibility_level = 'TECHNICIAN') AS "technicianId" FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (responsibility_level) responsibility_level, assignee_id FROM dsp_service_assignment WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND work_order_id = #{workOrderId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY responsibility_level, (task_id = #{taskId}) DESC, effective_from DESC, created_at DESC ) active_assignment HAVING count(*) > 0

SELECT #{taskId} AS "taskId", max(assignee_id) FILTER (WHERE responsibility_level = 'NETWORK') AS "networkId", max(effective_from) FILTER (WHERE responsibility_level = 'NETWORK') AS "networkEffectiveFrom", max(reassignment_reason_code) FILTER (WHERE responsibility_level = 'NETWORK') AS "networkReassignmentReasonCode", max(assignee_id) FILTER (WHERE responsibility_level = 'TECHNICIAN') AS "technicianId", max(effective_from) FILTER (WHERE responsibility_level = 'TECHNICIAN') AS "technicianEffectiveFrom", max(reassignment_reason_code) FILTER (WHERE responsibility_level = 'TECHNICIAN') AS "technicianReassignmentReasonCode" FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (responsibility_level) responsibility_level, assignee_id, effective_from, reassignment_reason_code FROM dsp_service_assignment WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND work_order_id = #{workOrderId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY responsibility_level, (task_id = #{taskId}) DESC, effective_from DESC, created_at DESC ) active_assignment HAVING count(*) > 0
